ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "spectacle_prescription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectacle prescription of the patient */,
  "astigmatism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the astigmatism condition of the patient */,
  "tear_production_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tear production rate of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_tear_production_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tear_production_rate_id") REFERENCES tear_production_rates ("tear_production_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_astigmatism_id FOREIGN KEY ("astigmatism_id") REFERENCES astigmatism ("astigmatism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_spectacle_prescription_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectacle_prescription_id") REFERENCES spectacle_prescriptions ("spectacle_prescription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectacle_prescriptions" (
  "spectacle_prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectacle prescription */,
  "spectacle_prescription_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectacle prescription (e.g., Myope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spectacle prescription */,
  "standard_recommendation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the prescription is a standard recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectacle_prescription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "astigmatism" (
  "astigmatism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each astigmatism condition */,
  "astigmatism_name" TEXT /* Name of the astigmatism condition (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the astigmatism condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("astigmatism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tear_production_rates" (
  "tear_production_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tear production rate */,
  "tear_production_rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the tear production rate (e.g., Reduced, Normal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tear production rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tear_production_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_lenses" (
  "recommended_lens_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommended lens */,
  "recommended_lens_name" TEXT /* Name of the recommended lens */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the lens */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the lens */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the lens */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Comfort rating of the lens */,
  "vision_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Vision quality rating of the lens */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the lens */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lens is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommended_lens_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_outcomes" (
  "patient_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "lens_usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of lens usage (in days) */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_preferences" (
  "patient_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient preference */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date of the preference */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Description of the preference */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_preferences_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., optometrist, administrator, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectacle_prescription_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "spectacle_prescription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectacle prescription */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range for the rule */,
  "astigmatism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the astigmatism condition for the rule */,
  "tear_production_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tear production rate for the rule */,
  "recommended_lens_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended lens for the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectacle_prescription_rules_astigmatism_id FOREIGN KEY ("astigmatism_id") REFERENCES astigmatism ("astigmatism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectacle_prescription_rules_tear_production_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tear_production_rate_id") REFERENCES tear_production_rates ("tear_production_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectacle_prescription_rules_recommended_lens_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_lens_id") REFERENCES recommended_lenses ("recommended_lens_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectacle_prescription_rules_spectacle_prescription_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectacle_prescription_id") REFERENCES spectacle_prescriptions ("spectacle_prescription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_lens_characteristics" (
  "recommended_lens_characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommended lens characteristic */,
  "recommended_lens_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended lens */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the characteristic was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the characteristic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommended_lens_characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_lens_characteristics_recommended_lens_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_lens_id") REFERENCES recommended_lenses ("recommended_lens_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_lens_history" (
  "patient_lens_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient lens history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "recommended_lens_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended lens */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lens usage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lens usage */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for changing the lens */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the lens history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_lens_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_lens_history_recommended_lens_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_lens_id") REFERENCES recommended_lenses ("recommended_lens_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_lens_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_lens_outcomes" (
  "patient_lens_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient lens outcome */,
  "patient_lens_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient lens history entry */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_lens_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_lens_outcomes_patient_lens_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_lens_history_id") REFERENCES patient_lens_history ("patient_lens_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_lens_preferences" (
  "patient_lens_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient lens preference */,
  "patient_lens_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient lens history entry */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date of the preference */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Description of the preference */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_lens_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_lens_preferences_patient_lens_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_lens_history_id") REFERENCES patient_lens_history ("patient_lens_history_id")
)
